rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms 'Arrearages Brought up' as transcribed by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini's 'Arranagua - Brought up' is a misreading of the faded script, although its note acknowledges the difficulty. No amounts present.
Consensus between extractors. Visual confirmation shows clear heading.
Visual inspection confirms 'Gillingham Rectory 1 year' (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini misread 'Gillingham' as 'Hiddington'. Amounts are in consensus and visually clear.

Visual inspection confirms 'Do. Vicarage' (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini incorrectly added a dash. Amounts are ditto marks (quotation marks) in the ledger, extracted as empty strings as per protocol for explicitly written values.
Consensus between extractors. Visual confirmation shows clear description and amounts.
Visual inspection confirms 'Do. Vicarage' (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini incorrectly added a dash. Amounts are ditto marks (quotation marks) in the ledger, extracted as empty strings as per protocol.
Visual inspection confirms 'Garsston Rectory 1 year'. Both extractors misread the place name ('Garriston' vs 'Yarnton'). Amounts are in consensus and visually clear.
Visual inspection confirms 'Mixed Rents Variable' (gpt-5-mini). gemini-flash misread 'Mixed' as 'Fixed' and 'Variable' as 'Receivable'. No amounts present.
Visual inspection confirms 'Gillingham Augmentation 1 year' (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini misread 'Gillingham' as 'Hiddington'. Amounts are in consensus and visually clear.
Visual inspection confirms 'Do. 2 Mills 1 year'. gpt-5-mini missed the '2' and incorrectly added a dash. Amounts are in consensus and visually clear.
Visual inspection confirms '113' for pounds and '¾' (0.75) for the fraction, aligning with gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini misread pounds as '115' and fraction as '½'.

Visual inspection confirms pounds as '39' (gpt-5-mini) and fraction as '¾' (0.75) (both extractors). Description format 'Do.' (gemini-flash) is more accurate; gpt-5-mini omitted the period. The leading '3' for pounds appears as a single digit, not part of '391'.
Visual inspection confirms description format 'Do.' (gemini-flash) and fraction '¼' (0.25) (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini misread the fraction as '½' and omitted the period from 'Do.'.
Visual inspection confirms description 'Merton Rectory (Land Tax deducted)' (gpt-5-mini). gemini-flash misread 'Merton' as 'Shipton'. Amounts are in consensus and visually clear.
Visual inspection confirms 'Garsington Do.' (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini misread 'Garsington' as 'Yarnton'. Amounts and fraction are in consensus and visually clear.
Consensus between extractors. Visual confirmation shows clear description and amounts.

Visual inspection confirms 'Clifton Ferry'. Both extractors had different readings of the place/name ('Clifton Terry' vs 'Pitton Ferry'); I chose 'Clifton Ferry' based on the visible strokes. Amounts and fraction are in consensus and visually clear.
Visual inspection confirms 'Bensington 4 years' (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini misread 'Bensington' as 'Bennington'. Amounts and fraction are in consensus and visually clear.

Visual inspection of the surname 'Sinkard' (gemini-flash) is preferred over 'Blinkard' (gpt-5-mini), as the initial letter appears more consistent with an 'S' in this handwriting style. Amounts and fraction are in consensus and visually clear.
Visual inspection confirms 'Do. - Brooke 5 years'. gpt-5-mini misread 'Brooke' as 'Crooke' and omitted the period after 'Do.'. Amounts are in consensus and visually clear.

Visual inspection confirms 'Tintinhulle - Napier 2 years', amount pounds '17', and pence '0' with fraction '½', aligning with gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash misread the place name ('Swinkenhull'), pounds as '19', and pence as '1'.
Visual inspection confirms 'Do. - Beaton 2 years'. gpt-5-mini omitted the period after 'Do.'. Amounts are in consensus and visually clear.
Visual inspection confirms 'Trethewin 2 years' (gpt-5-mini); gemini-flash included an extra dash. Amounts and fraction are in consensus and visually clear.
Visual inspection confirms 'Little Lew - Taylor 2 years' (gpt-5-mini). gemini-flash misread 'Lew' as 'Sene'. Amounts are in consensus and visually clear.

Visual inspection confirms description '- Hadley 2 years' (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini misread the initial dash and the name 'Hadley' as 'Worsley'. Amounts and fraction are in consensus and visually clear.

Visual inspection confirms description '- Kindler 2 years' (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini misread the initial dash and the name 'Kindler' as 'Rinder'. Amounts and fraction are in consensus and visually clear.
Visual inspection confirms description '- Eden 2 years' (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini missed the initial dash. Amounts are in consensus and visually clear.
Visual inspection confirms description '- Hoorns 2 years' (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini misread the initial dash and the name 'Hoorns' as 'Simons'. Amounts are in consensus and visually clear.

Visual inspection confirms description '- Harley 2 years' (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini misread the initial dash and the name 'Harley' as 'Huxley'. Amounts and fraction are in consensus and visually clear.
